case_title: KATARINA DENESOVA VS. UNIVERSITY OF THE PACIFIC

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: RESET OF HEARING DATE DUE TO INCORRECT SCHEDULING INFORMATION AT TIME OF FILING CLAIM FILED BY PLAINTIFF DENESOVA, KATARINA
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF *FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00*** SERVED AUG-07-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT UNIVERSITY OF THE PACIFIC
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,579.00 FILED BY DENESOVA, KATARINA AS TO DEFENDANT UNIVERSITY OF THE PACIFIC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-03-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-15-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-15-2015 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY SIGMURD ABELSON---ASSOCIATE DEAN OF CLINICAL AFFAIRS. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE DAVID LAVINE. FILED BY DENESOVA, KATARINA UNIVERSITY OF THE PACIFIC

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DENESOVA, KATARINA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT UNIVERSITY OF THE PACIFIC PLAINTIFF DID NOT FULLY ESTABLISH THAT SHE HAD A CONTRACT WITH DEFENDANT FOR HER TREATMENT. THE DRAFT TREATMENT PLAN WAS NOT SUFFICIENT TO CONSTITUTE A CONTRACT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
